title: Spring Nail Colors We Love in Oviedo
excerpt: Soft pastels, sheer neutrals, and polished chrome are setting the tone for a calm, elevated season.
content:
Spring in Oviedo calls for breathable, elegant looks. We are leaning into soft pistachio, cloud white, and rose beige for clients who want a polished but understated finish.

For added dimension, try a single chrome accent nail or a micro-French with a rounded shape. The key is keeping cuticles pristine—schedule a hydrating treatment to pair with your color choice.

Care tips:
- Apply cuticle oil nightly.
- Rebook gel manicures every 2-3 weeks.
- Keep hands moisturized after sun exposure.

title: Pro Tips to Extend Your Gel Manicure
excerpt: Small habits keep your gel finish looking salon-fresh. Here is what our technicians recommend.
content:
A flawless gel manicure is equal parts product and aftercare. In Oviedo's humidity, we prep the nail plate meticulously and seal the edges for durability.

At home, avoid hot water for 24 hours, wear gloves when cleaning, and use a non-acetone remover for polish. If you notice lifting, avoid peeling; schedule a quick fix so we can protect the nail health.

Products we love:
- Lightweight cuticle oil twice daily.
- Mineral hand cream after washing.
- SPF on the tops of hands to protect skin tone.

title: Designing Your Perfect Spa Day in Oviedo, Florida
excerpt: Pair a luxury spa pedicure with aromatherapy massage for a restorative reset—no travel required.
content:
A spa day at Casabella Nail & Spa is designed to be calm and deeply restorative. Start with a mineral soak pedicure, follow with a paraffin wrap, and finish with a 30-minute aromatherapy massage.

Booking tip: choose weekday mornings for the quietest atmosphere. Our team can tailor scents and pressure to your preference, and we sanitize every station meticulously for peace of mind.

Need a gift? Ask about our curated gift cards for Oviedo friends and family.
